title: curanga bivalvis
side_effects: Curanga bivalvis can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches due to its high concentration of toxic alkaloids. Improper consumption of the plant's extracts can also cause vomiting, diarrhea, and stomach cramps. In severe cases, excessive use of Curanga bivalvis has been linked to liver and kidney damage, as well as irregular heartbeats and respiratory problems. It is essential to consult a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using Curanga bivalvis for any health purposes.
